# NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group15

**Case**

Diffie Hellman group 15 (3072-bit modular exponential [MODP]).

## Declaration

```swift
case group15
```

## Diffie-Hellman groups

- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.groupInvalid**: A value indicating the group is not a valid Diffie-Hellman group.
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group1**: Diffie Hellman group 1 (768-bit modular exponential [MODP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group2**: Diffie Hellman group 2 (1024-bit modular exponential [MODP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group5**: Diffie Hellman group 5 (1536-bit modular exponential [MODP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group14**: Diffie Hellman group 14 (2048-bit modular exponential [MODP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group16**: Diffie Hellman group 16 (4096-bit modular exponential [MODP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group17**: Diffie Hellman group 17 (6144-bit modular exponential [MODP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group18**: Diffie Hellman group 18 (8192-bit modular exponential [MODP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group19**: Diffie Hellman group 19 (256-bit random elliptic curve group over GF[P] [ECP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group20**: Diffie Hellman group 20 (384-bit random elliptic curve group over GF[P] [ECP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group21**: Diffie Hellman group 21 (521-bit random elliptic curve group over GF[P] [ECP]).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group31**: Diffie Hellman group 31 (Curve 25519).
- **NEVPNIKEv2DiffieHellmanGroup.group32**: Diffie Hellman group 32 (Curve 448).
